title: Andy Rachleff endorses Incorruptible
summary: Wealthfront and Benchmark Capital cofounder Andy Rachleff calls Incorruptible the most practical guide to keeping a company mission-driven as it scales, at a time when Silicon Valley feels increasingly mercenary.
blockquote: After decades as a venture capitalist and then founding Wealthfront, I've learned it's incredibly hard to keep a company truly mission-driven as it scales. Incorruptible is the most practical guide I've seen to doing exactly that. At a time when Silicon Valley feels increasingly mercenary, this book is a refreshing reminder that idealism and performance are not trade-offs.
attribution_title: Cofounder of Wealthfront and Benchmark Capital; Lecturer at Stanford GSB
